calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-20-2004 Vacated

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-24-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on for Default Prove Up
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR:Carlito Mandia

Appearances:
Arnold Evje, Esq. For Plaintiff: M. Shah, the Property Manager, also present was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: M. Shah and against the defendant: Eugene Louis Burr
As follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at: 439 Jones St. #207, San Francisco,
and the following money judgment:
Back Rent of $750.00
Per diem damages $999.95
Costs of $148.30
For the total of $1,898.25
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-24-2004 Assigned To Trial Court
